REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF JOUNI ABU-ZAGHIBRA NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE IS DENIED. "[E]XCEPT PERHAPS BY MUTUAL CONSENT OF THE PARTIES, AN UNLAWFUL DETAINER ACTION MAY NOT GENERALLY BE TRIED TOGETHER WITH OTHER CAUSES. CHILDS V. ELTINGE (1973) 29 CAL.APP.3D 843. NO MUTUAL CONSENT WAS SHOWN BY THE MOVING PARTY. NO ARGUMENT OR AUTHORITY CITED TO SUPPORT DEPARTURE FROM THE GENERAL RULE UNDER THE CIRCUMSTANCES OF THIS CASE, WHICH BY MOVING PARTY'S OWN ADMISSION DOES NOT INVOLVE "COMPLEX" ISSUES. (SEE FOR EXAMPLE, MARTIN-BRAGG V. MOORE (2013) 219 CAL.APP.4TH 367). PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (501)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-13-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Consolidate
Off Calendar Feb-11-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF JOUNI ABU-ZAGHIBRA Notice Of Motion And Motion To Consolidate is DENIED. "[E]xcept perhaps by mutual consent of the parties, an unlawful detainer action may not generally be tried together with other causes. Childs v. Eltinge (1973) 29 Cal.App.3d 843. No mutual consent was shown by the moving party. No argument or authority cited to support departure from the general rule under the circumstances of this case, which by moving party's own admission does not involve "complex" issues. (See for example, Martin-Bragg v. Moore (2013) 219 Cal.App.4th 367). Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-29-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT GRAYSTONE PARTNERS, LP DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges facts to support causes of action 1, 2, 3, 6 and 7. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
